speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's been, offhand, a couple of months.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. I know they get escorted to the other side. It just seems like an odd idea to be walking in a city full of the thrown-away. I'm talking to the air right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, we're absolutely listening.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry. Keep going.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It was the best thing you never heard. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That changed the game forever.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I miss Scanlan Shorthalt so badly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Because he listened to you so much more?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, he's just my buddy.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Aww.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Speaking of just our buddy--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As we move on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: -- Pike is another concern. I would feel far more comfortable making sure that she is definitely on board for this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Really?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, that's difficult.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Phone a friend? What do we do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. I've been thinking about that, the best way to--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I mean, Hotis-- How long has it been, DM?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Since?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Since Pike wasted his sorry ass.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Not at the moment. However, if we have enough time, I'm sure we could go and find a local class that teaches, maybe go to the Lyceum and we could learn the basics. Few weeks."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Percy is just perfectly reasonable.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What about D-Roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What about Von?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: D-Roll's pretty good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: D-Roll--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What about Musel?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh jeez, I was just about to agree on it but--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: My god, you've found the line, and I've drawn it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know, D-Roll's pretty good. Man, D-Roll's great!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: D-Roll is actually pretty slick.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm suddenly extremely jealous of Grog for coming up with that name. Oh man, yeah, that's going to haunt you, my friend.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You're just going to end up Wings someday, that's all I'm saying.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Y'all wanna stop and get a wing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Infernal. But they speak Common, I'm assuming, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know. You really don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ah, shit. We don't know anybody who speaks Infernal, do we?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, Tary.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What about Zahra?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you have any spells that help you be able to speak languages? Isn't there a spell called Languages?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: One of them is about six years old. And the other predominantly works as a gardener in the vicinity.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, but that's different than knowing their language.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. So I don't think you'd pick up a language.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. You get to suck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, we may have to actually hire a guide once we're in there, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we can't hire anyone! Why can't we just a hire a tiefling? Don't you have any other tieflings in your tribe?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe, but I imagine they would be super-rare.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've been gone a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do we have any?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe ask dear old Dad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll say for the purposes of-- thank you for the text. So, he checked on the languages that Doty knew.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Aw, that's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Infernal was not one of them, I'm sorry. So there are two tieflings that exist in this society. They're pretty rare when it comes to Ashari, just because a lot of tieflings tend to not feel comfortable in some natural elements sometimes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys have been talking late into the evening, it's maybe one or two in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Aw, that's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Infernal was not one of them, I'm sorry. So there are two tieflings that exist in this society. They're pretty rare when it comes to Ashari, just because a lot of tieflings tend to not feel comfortable in some natural elements sometimes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of them is about six years old. And the other predominantly works as a gardener in the vicinity.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So it's not a guarantee that they know Infernal, necessarily?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not a guarantee, I don't think.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We could go ask.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I could go ask. I mean, I could go and get a few buzz-words, you know--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's find that six-year-old.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: -- hello, goodbye, please, thank you, left, right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Actually, most tieflings do learn Infernal as a language.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What time is it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As morning comes around, you all come to consciousness. The village of Zephra is already come to life. You can see that the townspeople are up and about, they're handling their business. The guard's being tended to. You can see the Windriders are already out, leaping from mountain peak to mountain peak, doing their perimeters in the vicinity. The children are up and being led to their various outdoor classes. The city is alive, and your business is your own.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Welcome to your yurt.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is it all water outside still? Like, a little bit of water on the ground? No. We're not there anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's windy. You're up on a cliff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog is very drunk at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So drunk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There's so much water outsi-- (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you guys do have separate places to stay. People clear out in clusters, you have your own locations to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Why does it smell like mayo?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's gross.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Taste of choice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It is mayo! Take that!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's just been drinking mayo. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Takes a strong constitution.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is vile! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's probably not kept well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's so gross. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Goodnight, lovely people.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys rest for the evening. The morning comes, with your mayo hangover. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's so pure, it never leaves a hangover. (laughter)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It is now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Any other phrases?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) Insight check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean-- maybe like a 'yes' and a 'no'? And then we'll totally leave you to your work, because I feel like I've totally interrupted, like, your flow and I'm so sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's okay. You're allowed to. You're the Voice of the Tempest, for goodness sake. I--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Doesn't excuse me from human decency. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Fair enough. 'Yes' is-- 'yes' or an acknowledgement, is more of a 'yai'."

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Yai.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yai. Was that right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Episode 91, where we force Matt to make up an entire language on the spot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Thanks guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is so wonderfully Doctor Dolittle.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yai equals yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ai.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yai.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nai. Nern. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She's not even waiting for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ermahgerd.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure, that's it now, guys. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No! No! Damn it Liam!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck! Shut up! Shut up!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, not 'ermahgerd'!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. As you come up to the edge and lean against the wall, looking over the side. First, a moment passes, and as your shoulder hits the wall, you smell something burning as you glance back. Suddenly your shoulder, you can see the heat of the actual wall with just a brief contact to your body has begun to burn--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What do you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Send up a flare.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: While we can do that--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's put our hoods and cloaks on. Weren't you going to make yourself look like a tiefling?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah. I can do it right now. Is anyone watching?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I see if anybody is watching right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's an omnipresent iron tower that's watching.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is there a-- I mean, iron tower?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's more the 'omnipresent' part that was really the point of that, but yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I thought you said an eye on a tower, and I was like, that's a different tower.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a different tower.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's copyrighted, I'm well aware.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Percy's got a good point. We might want to try and get out of the street. Get indoors. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I perceive anywhere that looks like where travelers would stay?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll do the same.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's better than me. 24.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: No. It's not super dark either. Imagine a very very very very cloudy day around sunset.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, from just peeking around the corner?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From just leaning and touching the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (groans) Ugh, it's Tucson.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You immediately notice that the bottom elements of your shoes are melting a little bit on the bottom with your steps.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my gosh. Good thing rubber doesn't exist here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The city itself is just this emanating source of perpetual heat. You're already sweating in the presence here, and as you glance around the corner and look at these buildings that rise up, you can see the architecture is hooked to the corner as the monolithic deep reds and blacks and grays that everything's built from, nothing belies an exterior that would seem to be welcoming to a traveling pack of people, at least not from your current standpoint.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And remind us, it's dim or it's not super bright here, is it? Dark?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Or the maze. You walk for the next ten or so minutes. Two things you notice, looking for patterns and elements of the city around. There does seem to be a general direction of, not individuals as such, but a lot of these fleshy masses, which you've read about in the book, they're referred to as lemures. They are fallen damned souls that have been tortured into this specific form that are the lowest base level of devil that exists here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to keep an eye out for anybody that looks like they're noticing us too much, anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, same.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Natural snitch.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes, of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Natural snitch!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: -- a problem.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are a problem.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I may have to-- I'm aware that there's a lifespan on this die, that I may eventually need to put it away.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We are in hell. If it's going to come out anywhere--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If you roll one more natural 20, it's just going to dissolve into gold dust and float away.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Heads.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's okay. One of these days, your contract will come to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm well aware.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: If you lift up Taliesin's mohawk, you can see the little tiny, little points. Little horns.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: But a lot of them seem to be going in this certain direction. It's difficult to maintain focus on the direction of the tower if you have to avert your eyes. However, if you're looking in a particular direction, it doesn't follow your vision when you move, it's whenever you have to look away and change your perspective on the horizon, that's when it appears elsewhere. So, you assert yourself in a direction and maintain that way. After about ten, 15 minutes, there's no discernable gaining of distance on the tower.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If you roll one more natural 20, it's just going to dissolve into gold dust and float away.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Heads.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's okay. One of these days, your contract will come to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm well aware.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: If you lift up Taliesin's mohawk, you can see the little tiny, little points. Little horns.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Or the maze. You walk for the next ten or so minutes. Two things you notice, looking for patterns and elements of the city around. There does seem to be a general direction of, not individuals as such, but a lot of these fleshy masses, which you've read about in the book, they're referred to as lemures. They are fallen damned souls that have been tortured into this specific form that are the lowest base level of devil that exists here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just a fleshy mass, Liam.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I want to go to bed.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Ten minutes' travel, Percival, by the way? Still not anywhere near closer to the tower.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try and start focusing on that for the next walk. When one gets down close, I want to see if I can see what it is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Some of them look to be imps. Armored imps. These tiny little things that dive through. Some appear to be larger. Some have long tails that draw behind them, their giant leathery wings, and they just glide through. You get a glance at one that seems to have a human torso and legs that are hanging at its sides as it swoops through, like a sentinel just watching over the city. A lot seem to be doing arcs to and from the tower as you watch these patterns--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I could fly up in the air and see if I can spot a market.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I could Beast Shape into something that's natural--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's better.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Better? Well, I don't like anybody going up.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He gives you all a really dark look. "We'll say for the stay. A few days, you said, right?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Organ?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Too conscious?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Too conscious? (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He leans in and goes, "I can provide that, don't worry. How're you paying?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Will coin suffice?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I suppose."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If we get anything more exciting, we'll be sure to let you know. We just got here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "One room," and he puts up a thick, meaty finger that you can see has-- it's been broken in two places and not healed right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, stop it, Matt! Ugh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Three rooms, and a special meal for the lot. 250 gold."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wow, wow, vacation destination right here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm totally okay with that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's airport prices.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's be honest, it doesn't really matter what we think about that price.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You, sir, is that 250 a night or 250 total for our stay?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Cool. So as you guys take a good ten minutes or so. As you're looking over the room, everyone's Alter Selves except for Keyleth's fade.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, it's just a bed in New York City in July.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I open up the bag of colding and just like put my face next to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Don't fall in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I just want to breathe in the cold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Don't lick it, either.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, should we all go to one room, then?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I want to look all around the room and see if anybody's watching, if there's any kind of holes in the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, is there any kind of bugs or any-- bugs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Bugs or bugs. I cast black light.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bugs and bugs and bugs and bugs-- I cast black light!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: By the way, the buzz, if you will, the rush slowly begins to fade over the next minute or so. Taryon finishes his Identification and goes, "Huh. Apparently these are receptacles to contain a fragment of refined soul."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, right!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Tary. Tary. There are beds. And Keyleth goes and jumps up on a bed, and just starts jumping on them a little.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Tary goes like-- leans into you and goes like, "Is she hitting on me?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As Keyleth jumps in the bed on the background.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's hard to tell sometimes. Just go with it. Don't make any sudden movements, and let her get it out of her system.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Right, right."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Mattresses are springy here!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What's the D&D equivalent of a glowstick?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It'd be a Sunrod.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's actually true.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is actually true. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to gently pop her in the ankle to see if I can get her to just fall onto the bed and stop hopping.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (falling and slamming noise) Percy just knocks you onto your ass.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, Keyleth, okay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Though, over the next minute or so, you see parts of the back of his armor begin to glow a dull red to match the coloration of the edges of the buildings.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's very in-character.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth paces back and forth for about five minutes, and then goes, okay, I'm good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let it settle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm great. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Grog, do you want to keep leaning against the door, maybe? I'm just afraid-- I feel really uncomfortable in here. Are there windows in the room at all?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I touch the door with my pointy finger real quick?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is it burny?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe Doty can lean against the door? Stand in front of the--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey yeah, Tarytown, can you have Dotes lean on the door?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which, by the way, as Grog does that, Doty goes-- into the door, and Taryon's like, "Oh, Doty, you can stop doing that, but do lean against the door."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does he take fire damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Doesn't appear to be affecting him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You really have no idea. I mean, there are beds, there are places to stay, and from what you can tell, there are-- there is traffic from creatures that travel from different planes, probably require sleep. So, whether or not there is a day-night cycle based on any sort of improbable sun, there probably are expected day-sleep cycles for creatures that need to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I would think so-- ol' broken sausage finger may be sharper than we think.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hmm, I have a feeling there are more eyes on us here than we even realise.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'm sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey, I'm really hungry, can we have that fucking Feast now?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and I make a Heroes' Feast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. You guys go ahead and muster the Heroes' Feast.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mark off 1,000 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Extra hit points, no fear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Lustrous hair.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Shiny fingernails.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Shiny fingernails. Feel like you ate a soul.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does that mean all of our heal-- our points are healed, or are we just--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, if you guys take a full rest, you will.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Oh, that's the question I wanted to ask you: did we know if here, night and day is the same?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, that wasn't in any of his books?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an intelligence check, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's 12.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, so everyone gets a bonus of ten-- that's an average, I guess. Close to average. So, ten maximum hit point increase to everybody for the next 24 hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Oh, that's the question I wanted to ask you: did we know if here, night and day is the same?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, that wasn't in any of his books?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an intelligence check, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's 12.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You really have no idea. I mean, there are beds, there are places to stay, and from what you can tell, there are-- there is traffic from creatures that travel from different planes, probably require sleep. So, whether or not there is a day-night cycle based on any sort of improbable sun, there probably are expected day-sleep cycles for creatures that need to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They pump oxygen in, you can stay up as late as you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No windows.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So Keyleth, roll 2d10.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm so excited.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on, now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Big money, no whammies! That's an eight for one, and the other, not as good. Ten total.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So you cheer and talk for about ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I also, at the end of dinner say, I would like to raise a toast. To Vox Machina: for going and being together all the way into hell and back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, fingers crossed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, let's not get ahead of ourselves.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We might not come back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, all the way to Hell and--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: To hell!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Thanks to the wonderful guidance of the Voice of the Tempest!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) Oh Tary.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh jeez.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Keyleth of the Air Ashari and-- keep writing this down-- and to the majesty and the heroic and adventurous drive--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of Taryon Darrington!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Of Tary-- Everybody, to Taryon Darrington!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "To me!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And with that, I do Inspiring Leader, my newest feat since I'm a leader. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What voice is this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is your "Leader" voice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This is why I'm a voice actor. And--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It took an hour, a little over an hour since your arrival. Since you guys did your transformations.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So over this part.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Very, very manicured cuticles. And I don't know what else to say for ten minutes about Tary.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are we staying in? For the, for a bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: On the plus side, we're all very tired now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What else is there to say about Taryon Darrington?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Don't ask me. Please don't ask me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What are you guys doing? Are you resting?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. Should we? Rest? I don't even know what time it is here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It could be like early morning and we could rest and then wake up in the middle of the night.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We've only been traveling for like a few hours, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But it could be a completely different time here!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. But it's more about your internal clock, whatever you want to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It took us quite a while to find this place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I've also expended my 6th, 7th and 8th-level spells.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It took an hour, a little over an hour since your arrival. Since you guys did your transformations.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So over this part.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Very, very manicured cuticles. And I don't know what else to say for ten minutes about Tary.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are we staying in? For the, for a bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: On the plus side, we're all very tired now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What else is there to say about Taryon Darrington?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Don't ask me. Please don't ask me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What are you guys doing? Are you resting?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. Should we? Rest? I don't even know what time it is here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It could be like early morning and we could rest and then wake up in the middle of the night.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We've only been traveling for like a few hours, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But it could be a completely different time here!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. But it's more about your internal clock, whatever you want to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It took us quite a while to find this place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I've also expended my 6th, 7th and 8th-level spells.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. You've had maybe three hours, four hours since waking up in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What else is there to say about Taryon Darrington?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Don't ask me. Please don't ask me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What are you guys doing? Are you resting?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. Should we? Rest? I don't even know what time it is here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It could be like early morning and we could rest and then wake up in the middle of the night.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We've only been traveling for like a few hours, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But it could be a completely different time here!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. But it's more about your internal clock, whatever you want to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It took us quite a while to find this place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I've also expended my 6th, 7th and 8th-level spells.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It took an hour, a little over an hour since your arrival. Since you guys did your transformations.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. We went to bed, got up, and then-- what was that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that was a burp. I forgot we were filming. (laughs)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You finish your drinks over the next couple of minutes or so-- it wasn't a heavy pour. Ipkesh just intensely, with a slight smile, looks you both over as you all quietly assess your positions in the discussion. No sign of that individual you saw earlier.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I will not speak your name in public. I will not speak your name in private, to be honest. You'll just be Our Friend Downstairs for now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Avoid the Whisperers." He snaps again and the sphere of darkness fades, and you're back in the tavern, unmoved.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anybody looking at us strange?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. The one person in the room there, the rather bulky fellow in the corner seems to be half-asleep, almost like (sleepy lip smacking).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We finish our drinks. Keep an eye on the door, see if that strange dwarf-like creature shows up.
